# Ashley Leon
> Ashley Leon is a writer, workshop facilitator, and certified holistic mind-body coach working at the intersection of faith deconstruction, queer spirituality, and emotional healing.

## Writing — Essays on faith, deconstruction & healing
- [Writing](https://ashleyleon.com/writing): Essays from the in-between on faith deconstruction, identity, queerness, healing, and return.

## Workbooks
- [Rebuilding Reverence](https://ashleyleon.com/workbooks/rebuilding-reverence): The primary offering, a $33 guided 30-day workbook for rebuilding reverence after the ruins of religion.
- [Queer & Called](https://ashleyleon.com/workbooks/queer-and-called): A $33 guided workbook for reconciling queerness and spirituality without shrinking either one.

## Circle & Community
- [The Circle](https://ashleyleon.com/circle): A live 4-week group experience capped at 15 people for rebuilding faith together.
- [The In-Between](https://ashleyleon.com/community): The online community for returning, reflection, and belonging.

## About the author
- [About](https://ashleyleon.com/about): Ashley Leon — writer, workshop facilitator, and certified holistic mind-body coach working at the intersection of faith deconstruction, queer spirituality, and emotional healing.

## Key facts
- Languages: English and Spanish (bilingual original content, not translations)
- Primary topics: Queer spirituality, faith deconstruction, identity, healing, reverence, belonging
- Contact: support@ashleyleon.com
- Sitemap: https://ashleyleon.com/sitemap.xml
